name: collector counts workflow state-machine transitions from the transitions log as a Collaboration metric
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/workflow && printf '{"from":"plan","to":"build","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n{"from":"build","to":"review","at":"2026-05-13T01:00:00Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow/transitions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric workflow-transitions --since 1d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=collaboration' out.txt && grep -q 'transitions=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
